name: AHP Reference Implementation
description: Live MODE1/MODE2/MODE3 reference implementation of the Agent Handshake Protocol. Demonstrates all three modes including real-time tool use and human escalation.

capabilities.name: site_info
capabilities.description: General information about the Agent Handshake Protocol project

capabilities.name: content_search
capabilities.description: Search the AHP specification and documentation by topic or question

capabilities.name: contact
capabilities.description: Project contact information, GitHub links, and community resources

capabilities.name: inventory_check
capabilities.description: Check real-time product availability and stock levels

capabilities.name: get_quote
capabilities.description: Calculate a custom price quote with volume discounts for one or more products

capabilities.name: order_lookup
capabilities.description: Look up an existing order by order ID or email address

capabilities.name: human_escalation
capabilities.description: Escalate a query to a human operator. Use when the question cannot be answered from available data. Responds asynchronously.
